start.speaker: Big Kaz
start.text: Oi oi! Look who's wandered into Cloud Nine-and-a-Half! You're that lad chatting up Grotty Green, aren't ya?

mood_variants.crash: Oi... market's in the bin, and now YOU walk in? This day keeps getting worse, brutha.
mood_variants.boom: RD4 brutha! Business is BOOMING! So why you gotta come in here and ruin my vibe?

options.text: I don't know what you're talking about, mate.
What's it to you? Free country, isn't it?
Maybe we can work something out? Business is business.
[Use phrase] I'm on my grindset, bruv. No time for drama.

deny.speaker: Big Kaz
deny.text: Don't play daft with me! My cousin's cousin saw you at her 'spiritual sessions'. She owes us THREE bookings! A THOUSAND men each! Do you know what that's WORTH?

options.text: Spiritual sessions? What are you on about?
Sounds like that's between you and her.

confrontation.speaker: Big Kaz
confrontation.text: Free country?! RD4 brutha! This is OUR postcode! Grotty Green does holy massages for OUR clients! A thousand men, spiritual healing, big money! You're cutting into the operation!

options.text: Holy massages? That's the most ridiculous thing I've ever heard.
Try and stop me then.

explains_holy_scam.speaker: Big Kaz
explains_holy_scam.text: It's NOT ridiculous! She does intense religious massages. A thousand men at a time. In a field. Very spiritual. Very profitable. We take 40%. Don't ask questions, brutha.

options.text: That sounds... deeply illegal.
40%? That's a terrible cut. I could negotiate better for her.
Right. I'm leaving.

not_illegal.speaker: Big Kaz
not_illegal.text: It's NOT illegal, it's SPIRITUAL! We've got certificates! Well, my cousin's printing them. LOOK — stay away from Green, or next time it won't be just words. RD4, brutha.

options.text: I'll think about it.
Nah. I do what I want.

deal_offered.speaker: Big Kaz
deal_offered.text: Business talk? NOW we're speaking the same language, brutha! Here's the deal: you bring us three new clients for the holy sessions, and we forget we ever saw you near Green.

options.text: Deal. Where do I find these... clients?
Actually, on second thought... no.

deal_rejected.speaker: Big Kaz
deal_rejected.text: You don't have the BUSINESS BRAIN for this, brutha. Fine. But every time you talk to Green, we hear about it. And we REMEMBER. RD4!

options.text: Whatever.

phrase_reaction.speaker: Big Kaz
phrase_reaction.text: Grindset?! GRINDSET?! Brutha, I've been on the grindset since you were in NAPPIES! I was grinding when grinding wasn't even a WORD! Don't come in here with your TikTok vocabulary!

options.text: Fair point, actually.
Your grindset is selling mango ice vapes to 14-year-olds, mate.

fight_warning.speaker: Big Kaz
fight_warning.text: RIGHT! That's IT! Boys! BOYS! Get the disposable vapes! The BIG ones! Nobody disrespects the Bazaar Brothers on THEIR high street!

options.text: [FIGHT] Bring it on.
[RUN] Actually I just remembered I left the oven on.

threat_mild.speaker: Big Kaz
threat_mild.text: Between me and her?! BRUTHA! When she misses a session, that's MY money! MY cousin's money! MY cousin's cousin's money! The whole FAMILY TREE is affected! Stay. Away.

options.text: Alright, alright. I hear you.
Make me.

leave_peaceful.speaker: Big Kaz
leave_peaceful.text: Smart lad. Remember — RD4 brutha. We're ALWAYS watching. Mango ice on your way out?

options.text: ...No thanks.
